summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of redesigned Diia Thesis website with light Cossack theme. All major features working correctly including PDF reader with page flip animations, gallery, navigation, and keyboard controls.
passed_tests: Navigation bar with Ukrainian embroidery stripe and all required links
Hero section with Cossack horseman painting and theme pills
Read the Thesis button scrolls to PDF reader section
PDF reader loads with dark header showing 144 pages
PDF renders page 1 correctly with THE DIIA THESIS title
Next page button works with page flip animation to page 2
Progress bar updates when navigating pages
Page number indicator shows current page / total pages (1 of 144, 2 of 144)
Gallery section shows Gallery of the Steppe heading with 7 Cossack paintings
Painting cards display in polaroid style with slight rotations
Cossack quote block visible below gallery
About section shows 8 theme cards with icons and tags
Philosophical framework panel shows Marx, Wojtyla, Cossack Tradition, Catholic Social Teaching
Footer shows dark Cossack style with citation, download link, Ukrainian phrase Glory to Ukraine
Keyboard arrow keys navigate PDF pages (left=prev, right=next) after focusing PDF area
